en.k3d: 2 strength · 3 swim sessions · Hevy volume pending
en.eNote: No meals logged for Jun 26 – Jul 2 (last intake log: Jun 14), so the energy and burn charts assume the 2,000 kcal plan. Garmin active burn averaged 490 kcal/day, peaking 1,114 on Friday's swim block. Thursday (Jul 2) just starting.
en.bNote: Net exercise = Garmin active calories; standing BMR 2,414. Intake assumes 2,000 kcal all seven days (none logged after Jun 14), so the implied balance ≈ −904 kcal/day is exercise-driven, not measured. Thursday (Jul 2) just starting.
en.wNote: Bridge shows the last logged meals (Jun 12–14) — no intake was logged for the displayed week. Negative balance = deficit.
en.i1t: Friday's swim block was the week's peak
en.i1: Friday stacked a 2.1 km pool set (avg 131 / max 158, the week's hardest swim) with an 873 m open-water swim — 3h36 combined and 1,511 active kcal, more than any other day this week.
en.i2t: Two strength days anchored the block
en.i2: Strength Sat and Tue ran avg HR 108 / 113, maxes 147 / 147 over 53 and 63 min. Hevy still hasn't synced this week's lifts, so lifted volume — and any new per-set HR peaks — aren't in yet; the next refresh will fill them.
en.i3: Monday's 500 + 8×200 + 100 (2.2 km, avg HR 130 / max 157, 773 kcal in 61 min) and Wednesday's N4×4 2.2 km set (avg 124 / max 162, 723 kcal in 68 min) layered sharp aerobic stimulus over the strength work.
en.i4t: Recovery stabilising; HRV nudging back up
en.i4: Last night reset well — a full 7h32 (score 85) — and this morning HRV recovered to 39 (still −2 under the 7-day avg of 41), with RHR 56 and stress 20. After the mid-week dip the autonomic read is stepping back toward baseline; nothing limiting, but it argues for keeping today's squat controlled rather than maximal.
en.rec: A full week of work: two strength days (Sat, Tue — avg HR 108 / 113) and three swims, led by Friday's double (2.1 km pool + 873 m open water, 3h36 / 1,511 kcal) with Monday's and Wednesday's 2.2 km interval sets (avg 130 / 124) adding the aerobic edge. Sunday was the only full rest; active burn totalled 3,432 kcal across the seven days. Recovery held through the block and last night reset well — 7h32 / score 85 — with morning HRV recovering to 39. Today's plan is a squat session: fine on this recovery, keep the top sets crisp but not maximal. Next 72h tracks the plan — Thu squat, Fri rest, Sat trap-bar DL. This week's Hevy lifts still haven't synced (tonnage and per-set peaks pending). No meals logged after Jun 14, so intake shows the assumed 2,000 plan.
en.foot: Data: 2026-06-26 → 2026-07-02 · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu via Freddy
en.foot2: plan: Mon swim · Tue hack squat · Wed swim intervals · Thu squat · Fri rest · Sat trap-bar DL · Sun rest/hike/bike

hr.k3d: 2 snage · 3 plivanja · Hevy volumen u tijeku
hr.eNote: Nema zabilježenih obroka za 26.6. – 2.7. (zadnji unos: 14.6.), pa grafovi energije i potrošnje pretpostavljaju planskih 2.000 kcal. Garmin aktivna potrošnja prosj. 490 kcal/dan, vrhunac 1.114 na petkovom plivanju. Četvrtak (2.7.) tek počinje.
hr.bNote: Neto trening = Garmin aktivne kalorije; standardni BMR 2.414. Unos pretpostavlja 2.000 kcal svih sedam dana (ništa zabilježeno nakon 14.6.), pa je implicirana bilanca ≈ −904 kcal/dan posljedica treninga, ne mjerena. Četvrtak (2.7.) tek počinje.
hr.wNote: Most prikazuje zadnje zabilježene obroke (12.–14.6.) — za prikazani tjedan nema unosa. Negativna bilanca = deficit.
hr.i1t: Petkovo plivanje bilo je vrhunac tjedna
hr.i1: Petak je spojio bazenskih 2,1 km (prosj. 131 / maks 158, najteže plivanje tjedna) s plivanjem na otvorenom 873 m — ukupno 3h36 i 1.511 aktivnih kcal, više nego ijedan drugi dan.
hr.i2t: Dva dana snage nosila su blok
hr.i2: Strength sub i uto: prosj. puls 108 / 113, maks 147 / 147 kroz 53 i 63 min. Hevy još nije sinkronizirao dizanja ovog tjedna, pa volumen — i novi puls po seriji — još nisu uneseni; sljedeći refresh će ih popuniti.
hr.i3t: Dva bazenska intervala dodala su kvalitetu
hr.i3: Ponedjeljkovih 500 + 8×200 + 100 (2,2 km, prosj. puls 130 / maks 157, 773 kcal u 61 min) i srijedin N4×4 2,2 km (prosj. 124 / maks 162, 723 kcal u 68 min) dodali su oštar aerobni podražaj na rad snage.
hr.i4t: Oporavak se stabilizira; HRV se vraća prema gore
hr.i4: Sinoć se dobro resetiralo — punih 7h32 (ocjena 85) — a jutros je HRV porastao na 39 (još −2 ispod 7-dnevnog prosjeka 41), uz RHR 56 i stres 20. Nakon sredotjednog pada autonomni pokazatelj se vraća prema osnovici; ništa ograničavajuće, ali sugerira da današnji čučanj ostane kontroliran, a ne maksimalan.
hr.rec: Pun tjedan rada: dva dana snage (sub, uto — prosj. puls 108 / 113) i tri plivanja, predvođena petkovim dvostrukim (2,1 km bazen + 873 m otvorena voda, 3h36 / 1.511 kcal), uz ponedjeljkov i srijedin bazenski interval 2,2 km (prosj. 130 / 124) za aerobnu oštrinu. Nedjelja je bila jedini potpuni odmor; aktivna potrošnja ukupno 3.432 kcal kroz sedam dana. Oporavak je držao kroz blok, a sinoć se dobro resetiralo — 7h32 / ocjena 85 — uz jutarnji HRV koji se vraća na 39. Današnji plan je trening čučnja: u redu uz ovaj oporavak, drži gornje serije oštre, ali ne maksimalne. Sljedeća 72h prati plan — čet čučanj, pet odmor, sub trap-bar MD. Dizanja ovog tjedna još nisu sinkronizirana (tonaža i puls po seriji čekaju). Nema zabilježenih obroka nakon 14.6., pa unos prikazuje pretpostavljenih 2.000.
hr.foot: Podaci: 26.6. → 2.7.2026. · Garmin fenix 8 + Hevy + Intervals.icu putem Freddyja
hr.foot2: plan: pon plivanje · uto hack squat · sri intervali · čet squat · pet odmor · sub trap-bar MD · ned odmor/planina/bicikl
